SEARCH
Package org.openapitools.codegen

Interface CodegenConfig

All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractEiffelCodegen, AbstractGraphQLCodegen, AbstractJavaCodegen, AbstractJavaJAXRSServerCodegen, AbstractJuliaCodegen, Apache2ConfigCodegen, AsciidocDocumentationCodegen, AvroSchemaCodegen, BashClientCodegen, ClojureClientCodegen, ConfluenceWikiCodegen, CrystalClientCodegen, DefaultCodegen, EiffelClientCodegen, ElixirClientCodegen, ElmClientCodegen, ErlangClientCodegen, ErlangProperCodegen, ErlangServerCodegen, GraphQLNodeJSExpressServerCodegen, GraphQLSchemaCodegen, GroovyClientCodegen, HaskellHttpClientCodegen, HaskellServantCodegen, HaskellYesodServerCodegen, JavaCamelServerCodegen, JavaClientCodegen, JavaConfigCodegen, JavaCXFClientCodegen, JavaCXFExtServerCodegen, JavaCXFServerCodegen, JavaHelidonClientCodegen, JavaHelidonCommonCodegen, JavaHelidonServerCodegen, JavaInflectorServerCodegen, JavaJAXRSCXFCDIServerCodegen, JavaJAXRSSpecServerCodegen, JavaJerseyServerCodegen, JavaMicronautAbstractCodegen, JavaMicronautClientCodegen, JavaMicronautServerCodegen, JavaMicroprofileServerCodegen, JavaMSF4JServerCodegen, JavaPKMSTServerCodegen, JavaPlayFrameworkCodegen, JavaResteasyEapServerCodegen, JavaResteasyServerCodegen, JavaUndertowServerCodegen, JavaVertXServerCodegen, JavaVertXWebServerCodegen, JavaWiremockServerCodegen, K6ClientCodegen, MarkdownDocumentationCodegen, MysqlSchemaCodegen, N4jsClientCodegen, NimClientCodegen, ObjcClientCodegen, OCamlClientCodegen, OpenAPIGenerator, OpenAPIYamlGenerator, PlantumlDocumentationCodegen, ProtobufSchemaCodegen, SpringCodegen, StaticDocCodegen, StaticHtml2Generator, StaticHtmlGenerator, WsdlSchemaCodegen, ZapierClientCodegen

    • setOpenAPI

      void setOpenAPI(io.swagger.v3.oas.models.OpenAPI openAPI)
      Set the OpenAPI instance. This method needs to be called right after the instantiation of the Codegen class.
      Parameters:
      openAPI - specification being generated
